author: PlayStation
text:
Moss: The Forgotten Relic - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/UP1983-PPSA33965_00-0843223579299651


Wishlist: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017247/

Join a tiny hero on a very big journey.

In Moss: The Forgotten Relic, guide a tiny but determined mouse on a heartfelt journey of challenge, courage, and connection through a living storybook world filled with forgotten ruins, ancient magic, and towering dangers. Coming to PS5 Summer 2026.

Meet Quill, a young mouse with dreams of greatness beyond the confines of her home. When she discovers a long-lost Green Glass relic, a sacred bond is forged with a mysterious spirit companion…you. Together, as Twofold, embark on an epic journey to rescue loved ones while facing the Arcane, a ruthless force seeking to rewrite the fate of the world itself.

Quill’s journey will encounter loss, doubt, and overwhelming odds, and through it she will be challenged to find her courage and believe that even the smallest heroes can shape fate.

Moss: The Forgotten Relic unites the beloved and critically-acclaimed Book I and Book II into a definitive singular adventure, beautifully enhanced and reimagined for its flatscreen debut on PlayStation 5.

Features
• Explore a fallen kingdom slowly reclaimed by nature
• Guide a tiny hero through mysterious places and towering dangers
• Solve handcrafted, diorama-like environmental puzzles
• Discover hidden secrets and surprises off the beaten path
• Face arcane threats with optional “skip combat” accessibility
• Uncover an epic and heartfelt tale of a hero who needs you
• Orchestral soundtrack by acclaimed composer Jason Graves

#ps5 #ps5games
